LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING TO CORRECT A TYPOGRAPHICAL ERROR. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR LYNETTE SWEET'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF UNDER CCP 706.051. THE $1,074.54 SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. (COURT TO PREPARE THE ORDER.) JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court modified its tentative ruling to correct a typographical error. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR LYNETTE SWEET'S Claim Of Exemption is Denied. Judgment debtor has not met her burden of proof under CCP 706.051. The $1,074.54 shall be released to the judgment creditor. (Court to prepare the order.) Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
